titleStmt.title: SII 15.134: original edition by P. B. Desai, Dines Chandra Sircar and G. S. Gai
No. 134. (B.K. No. 151 of 1928-29.) KAṬGĒRI, BADAMI TALUK, BIJAPUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a slab built into the front wall of Nārāyaṇadēva temple.
This is dated Śaka 1101, Viḷambi, Śrāvaṇa-paurṇimā, Monday, corresponding to 1178 A.D., July 31. The Śaka year was current.

It records that while the king was ruling at Modeganūr, and while his subordinates the Mahāmaṇḍalēs11varas Vīra-Bajjala and Vīra-Vikramāditya of the Sinda family were governing their chiefdom from rājadhāni Erambaravi, the village Nuggivāḍa situated in Haṅgarage Twelve, was bestowed to the Five Hundred Mahājanas of the agrahāra Kaḍakeṟe by Mahadēva-daṇḍanāyaka with the permission of Tikkarasadaṇḍanāyaka who is described as gandhavāraṇa of Sēnāni Sōvaṇa. The gift was made for the merit of Chāvuṇḍarasa of the Sinda family on the occasion of Tikkarasa's visit to Kaḍakeṟe. As in other records of this area the genealogical account of the Sinda chiefs is given in detail.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrī © jayatyāviṣkṛtaṁ viṣṇōrvvārāhaṁ kṣōbhitārṇnavaṁ dakṣiṇōnnatadaṁṣṭrā gra viśrāṁtabhuvanaṁ vapuḥ .
pitarastathā nō havyāni ca tathā dēvāḥ kiṁ bhūtamadhikaṁ tataḥ . namōha
© svasti śrīmatpratāpa prabaḷa kaḷacurikṣmāpa vaṁśyaṁ madāṁdhāri stōmāṁbōdhikuṁbhō dbhavanuditajayaśrī vadhūvallabha
ṇagaṇa vāsanurbbīśamastanyastāṁghridvaṁdvane rājisipanō jagadoḷu saṁkamaṁ kṣōṇi gīśaṁ . haranaṁśaṁ bhāvise
dhvajavāddhura ḍamarukatūryya vudāharisa tadanvayada bhūparene baruveseyal . Ogedaṁ tatkuladoḷ jasavogedi
ḷanasagaṁ vairigaḷaṁ raṇaśileyoḷuṁ biḍadogedogedu nijāṁkadasaravesaresevinagaṁ . tatpautraṁ negaḷdaṁ nijāribaḷavoṁdalbaṁnamaṁ kannama
yal hṛdrōgamaṁ jōgamaṁ tatputraṁ negaḷdaṁ nijāribaḷamaṁ hermmāḍi hermmāḍi tatsatputraṁ negaḷdaṁ nijāriśikhimāḷōdyajjalaṁ bijjalaṁ . hariya
ranaḍuttāṭandu beṁnaṭṭi gōḷmurigoṁḍartthamumaṁ gajōtkaramumaṁ tāṁ koḷvudaṁ kēḷdu dikparuśātmadviradaṁgaḷaṁ kavarguveṁdu
rbbereyaṁ perccigutirppariṁnnanadaṭaṁ śrī bijjalōrbbīśvaraṁ . Asadṛśa parākramaṁ raṇarasikamanaṁ bijjalōrbbipaṁ nijabhujasāhasaThe continuation of this inscription is published inēpigraphia īndica, Vol. V, pp. 26 ff.
dharāEnisi kuṁtaḷōrbbiyanāḷdaṁ . taṁnnaṁdanaṁ pratāpamarunnaṁdananamaḷasūnṛtōnnata guṇabhāsaṁ naṁdananuruśaucasarinnaṁdana
ḷdaṁ . viśvajanaṁ suvarṇnavṛṣabhadhvajanaṁ pogaḷguṁ pratāpalaṁkēśvaranaṁ virōdhinṛpaśau ravabhīmananuddhatāri daityēśvaracakracakradharanaṁ ripu
vasōmēśvara bhūpanaṁ kaḷacuri prathitāḷaya ratnadīpanaṁ . tatsahajātaṁ ripubhūbhṛtsa vidvatsaṁkuḷanāśritajana
vinutakīrtti saṁkamadēvaṁ . vidviṭvīratamestōmāri ripubhūpāḷāhitākṣyaṁ dviṣa tprōdvṛttēbhamṛgāri vairivanadāvōgrānaḷa śatrubhūbhṛdva
ri tārakamahāsēnaṁ bīradvē kāṁbōjarājanūrjjitayaśaṁ śrī rbbīśvaraṁ . svasti samasta bhuvanāśraya
llabha mahārājādhirāja paramēśvara kāḷāṁjara puravarādhīśvara suvarṇnavṛṣabhadhvaja ḍamaru katūryyanirgghōṣaṇa kadanapracaṁḍa kaḷacu
kamaḷamārttaṁḍa mānakanakācaḷa subhaṭarāditya kaligaḷaṁkusa sanivārasiddhi giridurggamalla caladaṁkarāma pratāpalaṁkēśvara ripumadana mahēśvara
cakravartti rāyanārāyaṇa niśśaṁkamalla saṁkamadēvarasaru modeganūra nelevīḍinoḷu sukhasaṁkathāvinōdadiṁ rājyaṁgeyyuttamire . taccaraṇa
ccaritarssiṁdavaṁśyarabhivarṇnitavidvaccakravijitamahībhṛccakrarbbijjalōrvvīpativikka rasar . Ā vīrāvatārara vaṁśāvatāraventene . poṁnuṁ mige kūrppina
rkkeyiṁ vikramabhūpana kaṭṭidalaginaṁtesadanācarasamaṁḍalēśvaraṁ bhūtaḷadoḷ . Anupamavairi maṇḍaḷikanācugi tatsahajātarappa nākanṛpa bhūbhuja
samahīśanadāma dhāriṇīśana porevetta maṁḍalikamaṇḍana bhīmanarēṁdranoḷpu sajjana nuta siṁgarasanātmajanācugimaṇḍalēśvaraṁ . Ācugimaṁḍalīkana tuhina nibhakīrttiya
jātaṁnṛpavidyācāryaṁ doravettaniḷācakraṁ pogaḷa negaḷda hermmāḍi nṛpaṁ . vibhavāma rēśvara prabhugabhinavabhojaṁgane negaḷdī hemmāḍinṛpaṁgabhayaṁganu kāraṇa
vetta cāvuṁḍanṛpaṁ . caṁḍōgraprabaḷapratāpaniḷayaṁ vidviṭṭaraṁ vikrama siṁda maṁḍalikāgragaṇya sō ttuṁga cāvu
rbbīśvaranatyudāttamahimāvāsaṁ mahībhāgadoḷ . toḍarddari naḍasi pudaṟiṁ
ḍa nṛpati bhujabaḷabhīmaṁ . sāhasika purātananṛpasāhasamaṁ mikka sāhasōnnatividi yiyene nivanalte sāhasō ttuṁga nivahada
gāralīle tanniṁdavesadu rājisutire maṇḍalikamukhadarppaṇa nirmmaḷa kānti sogayipaṁ cāvuṁḍaṁ . bīra gaḷavāgi tiḷakane
sadanudāraguṇādhāraṁ vīracāvuṇḍanṛpaṁ . havamalla vanīpāḷanoḍḍaṇamaṁ ma maṁ
vanēkavoḍḍaṇamumaṁ mā bijjaṇadēvaṁ nōḍe tūḷdidadaṭiṁ cāvuṇḍabhūpāḷakaṁ . A toḍaraṁ kali bijjaṇa ca
kravartti mikkadaṭaradēva mūvaragaṁḍanendu samada bhūpanaṁ . śrīvīramū nijatanujeyakkaḷaṁ gu
ṇilakṣmādēviyanagraṇi siriyādēviya cauṁḍabhūpaṁ paḍedaṁ . Avaroḷu siriyādēvi diṁ cāvuṁḍamaṁ
ḍaḷēśana tanayar . Avaroḷage . dūrevetta siṁdavaṁśāṁbara neṁba kaḷacuri kīrttige negaḷdaṁ maṁḍaḷikā
dyumaṇi maṁḍaḷikatiḷakaṁ maṁḍaḷikamukhadarppaṇaṁ maṁḍaḷikāgraṇi vīra bijja gāvatīpu
ravarēśvara siṁdakuḷakamaḷamārttaṁṇḍanāhavakṣāṇḍa ta kaḷacurikuḷō
rūpaviḷāsāpahasita śrīnandanabhujabaḷa rāmaṁ sāhasōttuṁganayyana siṁga samasta praśasti sahitaṁ śrīmanmahā rasanuṁ tatta
nujāta mahāmaṇḍaḷēśvara vīravikramādityadēvarasa kariviḍi mūvatta
kkavadhipatigaḷenisi nijarājadhāni yeraṁbaraviya bijjala dēvara
murāri bhujabaḷamahadēva daṇḍanāyaka caragātmadē
yū piriyarasiyaru mu kāloḷu dattiya mahāgrahāra lavāḍa parivṛta va
sudhātaḷadoḷu kuṁtaḷadharitrīsogayiku mahā grahārava vainūrbbarmmā
ḍi sanmānasaṁpattigavānukūlyavu pradhāna
mahadēva daṁḍanāyakana biṁnapadiṁ haṁgarage haṁneraḍa
sōttuṁga vīracāvuṁḍadēvargge śrīyōnimittaṁ mahā vabhōgya yōgya
rājalakṣaṇaprayuktananisi . kaḷacurikuḷamukhamukura kaḷacuri kuḷakamaḷa kaḷacuri cakravartti saṁka
madēvaṁ . tatprabaḷapradhānanadhikōnnatamā nūnadāna virā
jitakīrtti subhaṭāgraṇi sōvaṇa daṁḍanāyakaṁ . taṁna
nayajñatetaṁna dōrbbala taṁna negaḷte mikkudenalā yyaṁ sōvaṇa ca
mūpanoḷ bbaripa māri
ya maṇi calakke
balkaṇi negaḷda nāyakarāma nisuvamōgha
bāṇa
guṇavā sēnabōvaṁ viśiṣṭa . Ā ca rāmara
namita pādapadmaṁ . binada pina nele
doretuṁnatiya na tanmunīṁdrana . Ā mudgalānvayada dharāmararā veḍevaṟiya dēvastōma
karahaḍanālsāsiradoḷ pogarttevettudu kaṁpaṇaṁ kaṇeṁbaḍe grahā rābharaṇaṁ telasaṁga
maudgalya kulāṁbōdhinidhi himarōciyaṇnamarasaṁ negaḷdaṁ . kaḷa ṇname yanāyakana suta sōdeyara kulatilaka
kulatilakana padmarasana kulavadhuviṁduvadana sakalaguṇasadane viniścalamati suputravati caṭṭave
guṇātme caṭṭāṁbikegādaradiṁ sutarādarttikkarasaṁ kalidēvaneṁba tējōnidhigaḷ . Āva roḷage . dēvanidircciyuṁ tolagadī kali budharakṣaṇārtthadēva dēvanenippa dānanidhiyoḷ vasudhā
yēkatvaṁ vudbhāvitavāda sēvyaguṇadoḷnegaḷguṁ kalidēvanāyaka śrīvinutābhidhāna vuḷidē ḷidanoḷnagaḷpeṁtukūḍuguṁ . ma na caritradoḷpu guru maṁtra nadī tanaya
ta śaucavinajātaṁgeṁtu satyōktimaṁṇḍanamādaṁtire sōvaṇayya pṛtanādhīśāgragaṇyage da kalidēvanāyakanudāratā ra�ṁ . kayyamugidurbbare
bāppeyene pratimaṁtri maṇimukura tikkayana sahajātakalayaṁ sēnādhināthamaṇḍanana sedaṁ . kalidēva kalidēvagaṁ piriyaṁ
ṇyadabaladiṁ śrītikkarājadaṁḍādhīśaṁ . rājakuḷavallabhaṁ śrīrājakaḷā caraṇa sarasijamadhuparāja rājisidaṁ tikkarājadaṁḍādhīśaṁ . guṇi daṁḍādhipa cūḍāmaṇi
yenisida tikkarājanagratanūjaṁ praṇutayaśōnidhi sujanāgraṇi padmarasaṁ camūpamaṇḍanane sedaṁ . vinutākāraṁ harapadmanābhadēvatanojana nayanavallabha calvina kaṇi
tikkarasanesadanatanu viḷāsaṁ . balibalamanaḍaṁgipa bhujabaladaṁda vāmanatvama tanū baladiṁ trivikramatvake neleyāda śrītrivikramaṁ bhūtaḷa� . janakaṁ padma
rasaṁ nijāṁbike jagadvikhyāte caṭṭayya tammanudāraṁ kalidēvanātmakuladeyvaṁ śaṁkara permmeyaṁgane rājayyatanūjanūrjjitayaśaṁ padmayyanendandu maudgalya kulābdhicaṁdra
neṇeyār śrītikkadaṁḍēśanoḷ . maṁdeyareṁba �manoḍḍisi maṁneya bēṁṭe kāṟanāduṁ rāja goṁḍeyarasaṁge naḍagisi ḍudō lōkōnnatanāda
koṁḍeyara gaṁḍananippadaṭuṇmipoṇmedānōṁnatiyiṁ trivikrama camūpati māvana gandha vāraṇaṁ . Āne ndu toḍardarisēnegaḷaṁ dāni yenisi du ddāniyanāṁtaṁ sōvaṇa
sēnāniya gaṁdhanāraṇaṁ tikkarasaṁ . Antenisi bāgaḍagenāḍadhikāri daṇḍanāyakaṁ tikkarasaṁ nijadēśādhikaraṇaṁgaḷappa samastadharmmaṁgaḷaṁ svadharmmadiṁ pratipālisuttuṁ janamēda(ja)ya
dattiyagrahāraṁ baḷaṁjadādivaṭṭaṇa vekkalavāḍa kuttuṁbittiyenisida kaḍakeṟege vijayaṁgeyda ya mahājanaṁgaḷiṁ dorayarene . mahi baṇnise budharakṣāmaṇigaḷu
peṁpu paḍedarāśritajanaciṁtāmaṇigaḷagrahāraśirōmaṇi kaḍakeṟeya vipracūḍāmaṇiga prapaṁcadoḷ tanagāda dēvisaraṇe padmajaṁ kaḍakeṟeyurbbīdēvariṇanenavi
yanādaṁ bhāvisuveneṁba naccinoḷirppaṁ . susvaravidenisutuṁ cātusaraniṟpatti varṇna saṁpatti tigaḷś®ti sarbbasvar kaḍakeṟeya viprarōduttirppar . ma
neyaṁ māḍade mānisada nivēṣava kakaraṇiya saṁbaḷevenipoḷpina phalada kkaḍakeṟeya viprarōdalballar . kramajaḍeyaṁ kramara
thamaṁ kramaśikheya hāḷivacanamaṁ bissamanutkramamanubhayavacanamanuttama viprarmeṟevar . kaḍakeṟegide janmabhūmi rigvēda tāyi
rigvēdavirppa neleyena rigvēdadakaṇigaḷadaṟoḷesevaynūrbbar . kaḍakeṟeya sadvijaroḷ .
śaśiviśadayaśargge caturddaśavidyāpāragargge janasēvyakaḷākuśaḷargge kaḍakeṟeya vakhiḷāgamadoḷ . manevihitācārada neleyene negaḷda
r yajanayājanādhyayanādhyāpanadāna satpratigraha vinu dharadhairyar . pāḷiyatappade satatakrama viparyya
yaṁ māḍade vēdadoḷaṁ vyavahāradoḷaṁ guṇarenisidarudātta dharadhairya caryyarbbalarbbaṇnisa kaḍakeṟe
yaynūrbbarbhbhūmidēva sālvaṁ kaḍakēṟiya bhūmidē
vōttamaraṁ vayillade nuḍiyar nuḍipada mahājanaṁga varmmeṟevar . puruṣārtthāya
tanaikaratnakaḷaśarssāhityalakṣarsvayaṁ kalpabrāhmya kuḷa pradīparenutuṁ śīlayuta
reṁdainūrbbaraṁ līleyiṁ . svasti yamaniyama svādhyāya śīḷaguṇasaṁpanna brahmava śōtvaṁnar Aupāsanāgnihō
tragurumarudatithipūjānirataranavarate śāstrāṁka caturdda śānavadya
vidyāsāravicāra caturānanarmmīmāṁsā kāvyanāṭaka bharatavātsyā yanādi catuṣaṣṭhi
kaḷāceturāsīti vijñānavijñarssāhityasarvajña vabhṟithāvagāhana pavitrī kṛtagātrar dvāttriṁśatsahasra
vasudhāmarāgragaṇyaragaṇyavarēṇya puṇya hitācāra pṛthabratar .
śrīnārāyaṇada cikēśvaradēvalabdhavaraprasāda vēdavidyāvinōda saṁkhyāsaṁkhyātarbhbhuvana
vikhyāta . vīrabaḷaṁjadharmmapratipāḷakarpparasamaya kar . ripuvana ra śaraṇāgatavajrapaṁjararappamahāgrahāra kaḍa
keṟeyūroḍeya pramukhavainūrbbarmmahājanaṁgaḷ kaḍavarabrāhmyācāra niṣṭagaṁ sva tammāḷkeya haṁgarage
haṁneraḍaṟa baḷiya nuggivāḍava pāramēśvaradattiyāgi māḍaleṁdu māva pradhānaṁ geysi sakāruṇya dānavāgi paḍeThis seems to be a mistake for mahāpradhānaṁ.
du sakavarṣa 1101 neya viḷaṁbi saṁvatsarada śrāvaṇa paurṇnime sōmavāra vyatīpāta daṁdu rasanā mahāgrahāradūroḍeya pramu
khamahājanavainūrbbarggalliya mārīcāsura pratiṣṭhita traipuruṣadēvatāsaṁnidhiyo yāge biṭṭa
vūra sīmā saṁbandhi mūḍaṇa mēre nuggivāḍa geyadēvarggeyalli
haḍuvaṇa mēre kaṟukana keṟe . vāyōvya moṭṭu sahita
naupabhōgyayōgya svā vasuṁdharāṣaṣṭhirva
rṣasahasrāṇi[viṣṭhāyāṁ jāyatē krimi .]
Digital edition of SII 15.134 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
